Slot: HEAD
AC: 5
INT: +5
SV FIRE: +5 SV COLD: +5
WT: 8.0 Size: MEDIUM

Item Type:Armor

Average Price: 9,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Ruins of Old Paineel (The Hole)
NPC Name
an elemental crusader
an elemental monstrosity
an elemental warrior
an unmasked changeling

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Lake Rathetear
Quest Name
Magician Epic: Orb of Mastery

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Ruins of Old Paineel (The Hole)

Not terribly rare
QuoteReply
# May 09 2010 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
Discordia
145 posts
10 or so Elementals killed. Basically cleared to the first tower and had it drop off the first one on the bridge.

Some inspired individuals sell these for 40k on Bristlebane.

38 posts
Ive been camping the front entrance hall for about 3 hours now... and not one elemental has dropped this. I have even went into the first lookout tower... whoever said this is a common drop should put the crackpipe down.

No No No
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2007 at 5:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1641169142039
Scholar
135 posts
Mind you, I'm pretty sure it could be rampant luck, or the fact that this zone is a hotzone now and wasn't when you posted, but we had three of them rot at the hole entrance... every elemental but one in the immediate entrance area (out of 7) dropped one of these...

# Apr 12 2006 at 6:54 PM Rating: Default

2 posts
No one gives out ANYTHING anymore.. Thats why so many people are leaving the game. Everyone is out for their own "uber main toon" that they forget being a lvl 15 noob.

Keeps poping up
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 5:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252678944
View User Forum
42 posts
In the last week I've found this on the ground twice in the bazaar on E'Ci near the Nexus-side bank. You low Lv mages may wanna peek there every so often to see if there's a little bag on the ground with a binder in it :)

And don't forget, it's for your EPIC, so don't toss it when you get a better item :)

Edited, Sun Aug 11 18:50:13 2002

this is for the element of air you need elemental binder and crown of elemental mastery and the pegasus feather cloak off quillmane ... hand them in to Kihun Solstin and he hands over the element of wind

True Story!
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2002 at 9:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773230091
93 posts
Wow. Great stats for a newbie mage.

Too bad you have to fight through HELL to get it. LOL.

Edited, Mon Feb 11 10:09:31 2002
▲ Page top
RE: True Story!
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2003 at 4:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247435153
497 posts
Grabbed one of these today, soloing the entrance as a level 52 necro. Fear-kiting isn't an option so, I just pet tanked them. Easy kills.

The secret is the single-pull with Shadow Vortex. Great spell, low mana cost, low agro, singles every time.

After that, you just BoD and Cascade them into the ground. They won't live long enough for Splurt to be worth the mana.

After the first hall, things get harder, because you have to round corners to get mobs, and they come at you in 2s or 3s. Not a big deal if you use Screaming Terror, but that will drain your mana, and you'll have more down-time. Probably better to just kill the entrance-hall and then med up for the respawn.

Anyone know what the heck a living heart of a brell servant is for?
▲ Page top
RE: True Story!
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2002 at 8:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767782522
47 posts
If you jsut zone in and there are people there killing elementals there is one on almost every elemental.
▲ Page top
Very common drop
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 2:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250770727
Scholar
98 posts
"Rare"? Ha ha! :)

These are a very common drop off any elemental in the Hole. I was in a group that camped the entrance for EXP - we were there about 90 minutes and saw at least 4 or 5. We let them rot because everybody either picked up one that night or already had one in their bank.

When I first got one, I couldn't find a newbie mage to give mine to, and found out that merchants won't even give you any cash for them. ("I'll give you #pp for that." ::clicks 'sell':: "I don't want to buy that!") Eventually I made a mage and twinked her with this.

Very common drop in the Hole... really nice piece for mages, but it is a single-class-only item for a less-played class. Would not pay a whole lot for one of these.
▲ Page top
elemental...
QuoteReply
# Jan 20 2002 at 8:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758806040
3 posts
my mistake. it was an elemental defender.
*smacks forehead*

# Jan 20 2002 at 4:11 PM Rating: Decent

I am sure I saw a newbie in freeport with one of these, he was wearing it in the shield slot and it had the round white pulsing shield graphic.
Can anyone confirm?
▲ Page top
thats nice?
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 8:30 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757437506
27 posts
Was playing around with my level 6 mage. Someone walked up and gave me this, plus a sorcerous bowl. Which if you check on here it sells for 12k, but on my server 5-6k is more reasonable. That is nice.
▲ Page top
For Free
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2001 at 3:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765775906
11 posts
I kind of feel terrible doing what I did, now that I know how valuable this item is, but still it will be good money! I was messing around the rocks outside the Hole with a lvl9 non-twinked bard, and managed to get in! I watched a group killing "elemental warriors", and they were leaving them and not looting them. I waited a few minutes, just to make sure looting them wouldn't be rude, and boom! Elemental binder. Now I've got to drag myself to EC and sell this baby.
▲ Page top
I do not get it?
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2001 at 8:30 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
I am a lvl 14 mage and I have never been given ANYTHING. And yes I am always very polite. It is my hobby to save peoples lives.

RE: I do not get it?
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2001 at 5:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768513986
View User Forum
77 posts
I am a 16th lvl Mage and was given this item by a nice person who I've been grouping with now for 2 weeks. Apparently his 18th lvl Shaman who I've been grouping with also has a lvl 47 Wizzard which is the char that gave it to me.

I feel for you Anonymous poster. I too like to help others. If you are on Fennin Ro, plz say hi and I will see what I can do for you. I may have some items that were passed down to me as a newbie that you can have if you like.

Zacory
lvl 16 Mage
Fennin Ro

27 posts
mine was just handed to me too, odd.

Nah.. not the nicest
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2001 at 2:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965889937
1 post
He can't possible be the nicest. lol.. In Lake of Ill Omen, some guy came up to me and just handed me a Crystal Covered Shroud. I wore that till a week later when someone had their birthday party at the Arena.. my team won.. so I was awarded an Advisor Robe. Sold the CCS.. wearing the AR. Oh.. and some guy gave me the Elemental Binder too.. I got most of my items for either free.. or I bought them for selling CCS for 750pp..
▲ Page top
Take one down, pass it around
QuoteReply
# May 28 2001 at 5:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965869700
Scholar
49 posts
Went to the Hole for the first time last night, and in about 3 hours of hunting we saw 5 or so drop. They weigh tons but they're great gifts for newbies or guildmates that wouldn't stand a chance at the hole on their own. If you're high enough to hunt in the Hole, hopefully you've got 1 weight-reducing bag (mine's not much, that's for sure) so pick one up and bring it back for your friends.

Maladamuk Heartmender
Gnomish Cleric of the 48th Ring
Storm's Justice
▲ Page top
gift
QuoteReply
# May 17 2001 at 11:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248895822
2 posts
I was also given on of these in oasis. I complimented a bard on her nice looking armor and she gave me one of these. Weighs alot, but it's a nice +int buff for lower levels.

# May 04 2001 at 5:46 PM Rating: Default

12 posts
When I think "Elemental Binder" I always picture an Elemental 3-Ring Binder for some reason. You know, one of those things you put hole-punched paper in.

It makes a great mental image when you find out that it goes on a mage's head.

▲ Page top
makes a nice gift...
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2001 at 11:41 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
ok, here's the deal: i went LD one day and died but didn't know it. one week later i got back on and noticed i had nothing. i was lvl 2 at the time. i needed to get my guild robe back but needed money, to get money i needed to hunt, to hunt i need a malachite for a pet OR a weapon, neither of which i had. i shouted in steamfont for any spare things and a very kind 40 somethin cleric gave me a drachnid leg tip (6 atk 27 dly, good for lbl) an elemental binder and a bunch of malachites! for my lvl i had real good stuff. he also gave me somethin worth like 10pp and i bought my guild robe! now i have my guild robe which is mana+2. i really wish i could repay him in some way, but i have nothing to repay him with but thanks. thanks to all high lvls who give low lvls good stuff, you really make our existance better for us and who we are grouped with. :)
▲ Page top
Mith Marr
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2001 at 11:01 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
This runs about 200pp on Mith Marr.
▲ Page top
THE sweetest guy I've met in all EQ
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2001 at 9:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756920787
13 posts
I was sitting at Fironia Vie waiting for a GG to tox, when some guy just walks up and gives this to me. I swear that was the nicest man I've ever met in all of EQ!!!!!
▲ Page top
RE: THE sweetest guy I've met in all EQ
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2001 at 8:44 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Almost same thing happened to me on the BB server. I just turned 8 and was playing with my eye of zomm when someone asked me if i had a elemental binder.. Lol i said no i can't bind yet..

Anyway she gave this to me and she wasnt in a guild and i forget her name but i wanted to say Thanks.. and it is people like this that make the game fun and enjoyable..

Thanks for making my Week

Maggi <Sisters of Mercy> BB server

# Mar 05 2001 at 4:00 PM Rating: Decent
